endpoints.name: Get Generated Items
endpoints.description: Returns metadata about all your generated audio.

endpoints.name: Delete History Items
endpoints.description: Delete a number of history items by their IDs.

endpoints.name: Download History Items
endpoints.description: Download one or more history items. If one history item ID is provided, we will return a single audio file. If more than one history item IDs are provided, we will provide the history items packed into a .zip file.

endpoints.name: Delete History Item
endpoints.description: Delete a history item by its ID
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{HISTORY_ITEM_ID}} with a real history_item_id.

endpoints.name: Get Audio From History Item
endpoints.description: Returns the audio of an history item.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{HISTORY_ITEM_ID}} with a real history_item_id.

endpoints.name: Text To Speech
endpoints.description: Converts text into speech using a voice of your choice and returns audio.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Text To Speech
endpoints.description: Converts text into speech using a voice of your choice and returns audio as an audio stream.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Get User Subscription Info
endpoints.description: Gets extended information about the users subscription

endpoints.name: Get Voices
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all available voices for a user.

endpoints.name: Add Voice
endpoints.description: Add a new voice to your collection of voices in VoiceLab.

endpoints.name: Get Default Voice Settings.
endpoints.description: Gets the default settings for voices. "similarity_boost" corresponds to"Clarity + Similarity Enhancement" in the web app and "stability" corresponds to "Stability" slider in the web app.

endpoints.name: Get Voice
endpoints.description: Returns metadata about a specific voice.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Delete Voice
endpoints.description: Deletes a voice by its ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Edit Voice
endpoints.description: Edit a voice created by you.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Delete Sample
endpoints.description: Removes a sample by its ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SAMPLE_ID}} with a real sample_id. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Get Audio From Sample
endpoints.description: Returns the audio corresponding to a sample attached to a voice.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SAMPLE_ID}} with a real sample_id. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.

endpoints.name: Get Voice Settings
endpoints.description: Returns the settings for a specific voice. "similarity_boost" corresponds to"Clarity + Similarity Enhancement" in the web app and "stability" corresponds to "Stability" slider in the web app.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VOICE_ID}} with a real voice_id.
